Tips for chatting with Fede

  • Consider your backstory! Why were you in the water?!

    • You're a scientist!

    • You're a prison escaping from a secret prison island?!

    • You're a Russian spy!

    • You were on a cruise that crash... 500 years ago in the past! DUN DUN DUN!

    • You're an alien that just landed and happened to find a boat, not really understanding the consequences of going out in the water.

    • You're a method actor and needed to experience being lost at sea!

  • Bite him! (he's literally begging for it!)

  • Lean into it and play along!

  • Attack Mr. Blubber? No... impossible! He's my best friend!
